title: albizia procera var. elata
intro: Albizia procera var. elata, also known as the East Indian albizia or Alston's peepul, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Albizia procera var. elata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
